defaults.hook_text: ONLY PELE DID THIS BEFORE HIM

videos.video_subject: How Kylian Mbappe became only the second teenager after Pele to score in a World Cup final, then scored the first World Cup final hat-trick in over 50 years
videos.video_script: Before this man, only Pele had ever scored in a World Cup final as a teenager. Kylian Mbappe did it at nineteen years old. Then in the next final, he scored a hat-trick, the first in a World Cup final in over fifty years. He already has more World Cup goals than Cristiano Ronaldo. And he is still in his twenties. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Mbappe World Cup final goal, Mbappe hat trick World Cup final, Mbappe France blue jersey celebration, Mbappe World Cup goal slow motion, Mbappe solo run goal France, Mbappe scoring close up, Mbappe lifting World Cup trophy, Mbappe France national team, Mbappe intense face celebration, Mbappe goal celebration close up
